# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Default-config improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm install && pnpm build` runs locally
- [ ] The change is scoped to one concern
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or, if there are, they have been discussed in an issue)
- [ ] Any user-visible change is reflected in the README
